ksa_text: Skill in designing and implementing data privacy and protection governance frameworks, including compliance with privacy regulations, data protection policies, consent management, and privacy impact assessment procedures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to LLM Evaluator scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("data protection", "impact assess", "privacy.{0,15} ?:risk|assess|impact"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
